extension.name: Subscribe & Notify
extension.author: Bogdan Shumylo
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 3 or later; https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0
extension.description: Subscribe & Notify — newsletter subscription and new article notifications for Joomla. Visitors subscribe by email or Telegram through the subscription module; the content plugin automatically announces every newly published article by email, Telegram and Mattermost (incoming webhook). Subscribers are stored in the site database. Keywords: newsletter, subscribe, subscription, notification, email, Telegram, Mattermost, alerts.
